References

Reference material for the Faber language: formal grammar, design documents, and repository index.

EBNF grammar

The formal grammar for Faber syntax. Every production rule with annotations. Read more →

Design documents

Architecture decisions, deferred feature tracking, and design rationale. Read more →

Repositories

The faberlang organization: compiler (radix), CLI (faber), runtime (faber-runtime), package manager (cista), stdlib (norma), and graphics (triga). Read more →
